# Agent Workflow Walkthrough

## Media

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/dQw4w9WgXcQ" title="Agent Workflow Walkthrough" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Summary

A product-builder walkthrough showing how an agent queue can collect links, summarize them, and ask for review before filing anything permanently.

## Key Points

- Candidate queues work best when the save/skip decision is visible and quick.
- Videos need both playable media and transcript cache.
- The feed should distinguish "already saved" from "worth reviewing."
- Scheduler status should be visible because source failures are otherwise silent.

- Recommendation: review
